mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM sys_user WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND his_identity_id = #{hisIdentityId} AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id FROM sys_user WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND his_id = #{hisId} AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fd_department ( code, name, referred_name, his_id, tenant_id, del_flag, parent_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{referredName}, #{hisId}, #{tenantId}, #{delFlag}, #{parentId}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code = VALUES(code), name = VALUES(name), referred_name = VALUES(referred_name), tenant_id = VALUES(tenant_id), his_id = VALUES(his_id), del_flag = VALUES(del_flag), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE fd_department SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, referred_name = #{referredName}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, his_id = #{hisId}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE fd_department child INNER JOIN fd_department parent ON parent.tenant_id = child.tenant_id AND parent.his_id = #{hisParentId} AND parent.del_flag = 0 SET child.parent_id = parent.id, child.update_by = 'msun-mirror-sync', child.update_time = NOW() WHERE child.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND child.his_id = #{hisDeptId} AND child.del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fd_supplier ( code, name, referred_code, his_id, tenant_id, del_flag, address, phone, contacts, contacts_phone, tax_number, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{referredCode}, #{hisId}, #{tenantId}, #{delFlag}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{contacts}, #{contactsPhone}, #{taxNumber}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code = VALUES(code), name = VALUES(name), referred_code = VALUES(referred_code), tenant_id = VALUES(tenant_id), his_id = VALUES(his_id), del_flag = VALUES(del_flag), address = VALUES(address), phone = VALUES(phone), contacts = VALUES(contacts), contacts_phone = VALUES(contacts_phone), tax_number = VALUES(tax_number), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE fd_supplier SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, referred_code = #{referredCode}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, his_id = #{hisId}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, contacts = #{contacts}, contacts_phone = #{contactsPhone}, tax_number = #{taxNumber}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fd_factory ( factory_code, factory_name, factory_referred_code, factory_address, factory_contact, his_id, tenant_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{factoryCode}, #{factoryName}, #{factoryReferredCode}, #{factoryAddress}, #{factoryContact}, #{hisId}, #{tenantId}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE factory_code = VALUES(factory_code), factory_name = VALUES(factory_name), factory_referred_code = VALUES(factory_referred_code), factory_address = VALUES(factory_address), factory_contact = VALUES(factory_contact), tenant_id = VALUES(tenant_id), his_id = VALUES(his_id), del_flag = VALUES(del_flag), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE fd_factory SET factory_code = #{factoryCode}, factory_name = #{factoryName}, factory_referred_code = #{factoryReferredCode}, factory_address = #{factoryAddress}, factory_contact = #{factoryContact}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, his_id = #{hisId}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE factory_id = #{factoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fd_warehouse_category ( warehouse_category_code, warehouse_category_name, referred_name, his_id, tenant_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{warehouseCategoryCode}, #{warehouseCategoryName}, #{referredName}, #{hisId}, #{tenantId}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE warehouse_category_code = VALUES(warehouse_category_code), warehouse_category_name = VALUES(warehouse_category_name), referred_name = VALUES(referred_name), tenant_id = VALUES(tenant_id), his_id = VALUES(his_id), del_flag = VALUES(del_flag), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE fd_warehouse_category SET warehouse_category_code = #{warehouseCategoryCode}, warehouse_category_name = #{warehouseCategoryName}, referred_name = #{referredName}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, his_id = #{hisId}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE warehouse_category_id = #{warehouseCategoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fd_unit ( unit_code, unit_name, his_unit_id, tenant_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{hisUnitId}, #{tenantId}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE unit_code = VALUES(unit_code), unit_name = VALUES(unit_name), tenant_id = VALUES(tenant_id), his_unit_id = VALUES(his_unit_id), del_flag = VALUES(del_flag), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE fd_unit SET unit_code = #{unitCode}, unit_name = #{unitName}, his_unit_id = #{hisUnitId}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE unit_id = #{unitId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fd_material ( code, name, speci, model, price, sale_price, referred_name, register_no, medical_no, his_id, his_spec_packing_id, tenant_id, del_flag, is_use, supplier_id, factory_id, storeroom_id, unit_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{speci}, #{model}, #{price}, #{salePrice}, #{referredName}, #{registerNo}, #{medicalNo}, #{hisId}, #{hisSpecPackingId}, #{tenantId}, #{delFlag}, #{isUse}, #{supplierId}, #{factoryId}, #{storeroomId}, #{unitId}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code = VALUES(code), name = VALUES(name), speci = VALUES(speci), model = VALUES(model), price = VALUES(price), sale_price = VALUES(sale_price), referred_name = VALUES(referred_name), register_no = VALUES(register_no), medical_no = VALUES(medical_no), is_use = VALUES(is_use), supplier_id = VALUES(supplier_id), factory_id = VALUES(factory_id), storeroom_id = VALUES(storeroom_id), unit_id = VALUES(unit_id), tenant_id = VALUES(tenant_id), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update:
UPDATE fd_material SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, speci = #{speci}, model = #{model},
price = #{price},
sale_price = #{salePrice},
referred_name = #{referredName}, register_no = #{registerNo}, medical_no = #{medicalNo}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, his_id = #{hisId}, his_spec_packing_id = #{hisSpecPackingId}, is_use = #{isUse},
supplier_id = #{supplierId},
factory_id = #{factoryId}, storeroom_id = #{storeroomId}, unit_id = #{unitId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( user_name, nick_name, his_id, his_identity_id, customer_id, dept_id, status, del_flag, password, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{hisId}, #{hisIdentityId}, #{customerId}, #{deptId}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{password}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_name = VALUES(user_name), nick_name = VALUES(nick_name), his_id = VALUES(his_id), his_identity_id = VALUES(his_identity_id), status = VALUES(status), del_flag = VALUES(del_flag), customer_id = VALUES(customer_id), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET user_name = #{userName}, nick_name = #{nickName}, his_id = #{hisId}, his_identity_id = #{hisIdentityId}, customer_id = #{customerId}, status = #{status}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_department (user_id, department_id, status, tenant_id, create_by, create_time) SELECT #{userId}, #{departmentId}, #{status}, #{tenantId}, #{createBy}, NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_department WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND department_id = #{departmentId} )

INSERT INTO sys_user_department (user_id, department_id, status, tenant_id, create_by, create_time) SELECT DISTINCT su.user_id, fd.id, 0, #{tenantId}, #{createBy}, NOW() FROM m_msun_user_identity a INNER JOIN sys_user su ON a.user_id = su.his_id AND su.customer_id = #{tenantId} AND su.del_flag = '0' INNER JOIN fd_department fd ON a.dept_id = fd.his_id AND fd.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND fd.del_flag = 0 WHERE a.hospital_key = #{hospitalKey} AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND a.active_env = #{activeEnv} AND a.sync_batch_no = #{syncBatchNo} AND a.dept_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(a.dept_id) != '' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_department ud WHERE ud.user_id = su.user_id AND ud.department_id = fd.id )
